objections.issue: T26 (JointChatView) is missing T43 (jointChat/mySynthesis) in its depends_on. T26's own ACs state: "'My guidance' link in top nav opens a sheet/modal with the user's synthesis text (calls jointChat/mySynthesis)." jointChat/mySynthesis is implemented in T43. T26's current depends_on is ["T11", "T8", "T25", "T37", "T29"] — T43 is absent. This gap was introduced when round-2's sizing objection correctly caused T23 to be split into T23 (synthesis action) + T43 (mySynthesis query): T31 was correctly updated to depend on T43, but T26 was not updated in parallel. T31 depends on T43 ✅; T26 still does not ❌.
objections.fix: Add T43 to T26's depends_on. The resulting depends_on should be ["T11", "T8", "T25", "T37", "T29", "T43"]. No other changes are required — all five round-2 objections have been fully and correctly addressed.

summary: Round 3 correctly addresses all five round-2 objections: (1) NFR-privacy is now applied to T12 and T26; (2) T18 is split into mutations-only (T18) + AI action (T42), and T23 is split into synthesis action (T23) + mySynthesis query (T43) — both are clean single-surface tickets with no bundling; (3) T29 no longer lists T26 in depends_on, T26 now lists T29, T31 now lists T16 and T43; (4) the unlabeled surface-bundling inferences in T18/T23 vanish with the split; (5) T34 now owns admin-audit.spec.ts with a concrete scenario. The plan is structurally sound in coverage, NFR library, NFR application, Phase 0 completeness, sizing, testing realism, design fidelity, privacy/security fidelity, and decision surfacing. One dependency edge was not carried forward from the T23 split: T26 (JointChatView) calls jointChat/mySynthesis (T43) for its 'My guidance' link, but T43 is absent from T26's depends_on. This is the only remaining issue. Fix is a single-line change: add T43 to T26's depends_on.
